message:
fix: always set jsonl_export to canonical value, detect stale values in doctor (gt-m781w)

EnsureMetadata() and doctor's writeDoltMetadata() previously only set
jsonl_export when the field was missing, preserving stale values like
"beads.jsonl" left by historical migrations. Now they always set it to
"issues.jsonl". Doctor's hasDoltMetadata() now validates jsonl_export,
and daemon startup auto-repairs metadata via EnsureAllMetadata().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
